sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: 12 Health Care Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 healthcare stocks that experienced significant movement in Wednesday's after-market trading session. It details both gainers and losers, including companies like Staar Surgical, Healthcare Triangle, and AVITA Medical among those that rose, and Scienture Holdings, Zhengye Biotechnology, and RxSight among those that declined.

feed.title: American Airlines Pilot Delayed Flight Because He Was Stuck at Starbucks
feed.summary: An American Airlines flight was delayed due to a pilot being stuck in a Starbucks line, highlighting the airline's long-standing issue with poor inflight coffee quality. This incident underscores why airlines like United and Delta have invested in premium coffee partnerships to improve customer experience and operational efficiency. American Airlines recently partnered with Lavazza to address this problem, aiming to provide a consistent and high-quality coffee experience for passengers and crew, which is expected to reduce delays caused by crew seeking coffee elsewhere.

feed.title: Exane BNP Paribas downgrades AT&T Inc. (T) to Neutral April 2026
feed.summary: Exane BNP Paribas downgraded AT&T Inc. (T) from Outperform to Neutral on April 8, 2026, leading to a 2.39% intraday stock drop. The downgrade, reported at 07:20 AM ET, signifies limited near-term upside but did not include a new price target. Investors are advised to consider the dividend yield and payout sustainability, while Meyka AI maintains a B+ rating for AT&T, emphasizing earnings, free cash flow, and debt reduction as key catalysts.

feed.title: Pfizer Options Spot-On: On April 8th, 90,399 Contracts Were Traded, With 2.45 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: This article reports on the significant options trading activity for Pfizer (PFE) on April 8th. A total of 90,399 contracts were traded, with a notable open interest of 2.45 million, indicating substantial market attention towards the pharmaceutical giant's stock options.

feed.title: Aeroméxico flew nearly 2M passengers in March as load factor improved
feed.summary: Aeroméxico reported a 1.4% year-over-year decline in passengers for March 2026, totaling 1.99 million, yet its load factor increased to 83.3% due to demand outpacing capacity. International ASMs and RPMs grew, while domestic figures saw a modest decline, partly attributed to localized disruptions in February. The airline emphasized disciplined capacity management and network optimization to protect profitability amid fuel price volatility.

feed.title: Aeroméxico March 2026 Traffic Results
feed.summary: Grupo Aeroméxico reports a 1.4% year-over-year decrease in passengers transported in March 2026, though total capacity (ASMs) increased by 1.0%. Despite localized disruptions, the airline achieved an 83.3% load factor, a 0.6 percentage point increase from March 2025, demonstrating resilience and effective capacity management in a challenging environment. The CEO highlighted continued focus on network optimization and revenue management to protect profitability amid fuel price volatility.

feed.title: American Financial posts Q1 results April 29, webcast follows
feed.summary: American Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: AFG) announced that it will release its 2026 first-quarter results after 5:00 p.m. ET on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Following the release, the company will host a conference call and webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 11:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Participants can register for the call via telephone or access the live broadcast and accompanying slides online.

feed.title: Leidos Holdings sector president sells $317k in stock
feed.summary: Elizabeth A. Porter, Sector President at Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS), sold 2,000 shares of common stock for approximately $317,555 under a pre-arranged trading plan. These sales occurred on April 7, 2026, with the stock currently trading down about 19% over the past six months and its market capitalization at $20.21 billion. Despite the sale, Porter still directly owns 49,476 shares, and InvestingPro analysis suggests the company appears undervalued.

feed.title: Chevron's CEO made $104 million while America bombed Iran
feed.summary: A Wall Street Journal investigation revealed that top U.S. oil and gas executives sold $1.4 billion worth of their company stock in the first three months of 2026, coinciding with the war in Iran. Chevron CEO Mike Wirth alone sold $104 million in shares, with $17.2 million of those sales lacking a prearranged trading plan, suggesting a deliberate decision to cash out during a wartime market spike. Critics link these insider transactions to political influence, noting similar patterns during the Russia-Ukraine conflict and highlighting how such actions disproportionately benefit a small group while the costs are borne by the broader public.

feed.title: ADPT (ADPT) insider Chad M. Robins sells blocks totaling six‑figure proceeds
feed.summary: Chad M. Robins, an insider at Adaptive Biotechnologies Corp (ADPT), has reported proposed and recent transactions involving the sale of common stock through a Form 144 SEC filing. The filing details multiple individual sales in February-April 2026, including significant transactions like 99,225 shares sold for $1,589,941.71 on February 27, 2026, and 96,323 shares for $1,546,542.82 on March 2, 2026. This Form 144 notice indicates routine affiliate dispositions by the selling holder, rather than commentary on company operations.

feed.title: Affiliate resale notice for ADPT (NASDAQ: ADPT) — 10,000 shares listed
feed.summary: An affiliate of Adaptive Biotechnologies Corp (ADPT) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed resale of 10,000 shares of common stock through Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, with an aggregate market value of $148,400. The filing specifies 153,981,561 shares outstanding as of April 8, 2026, and also details several recent dispositions by Harlan Robins. This routine notice informs the market of potential future sales, with the timing dependent on the holder's decisions and broker execution.

feed.title: ADP declares quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (ADP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share, marking its 27th consecutive year of dividend increases. The payment is scheduled for July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. InvestingPro analysis indicates that ADP is currently undervalued, with the company maintaining a strong financial position and outperforming human capital management peers despite a year-to-date decline in stock value.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges ADMA Biologics, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADMA) Investors to Contact the Firm Regarding Ongoing Investigation
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is investigating potential claims against ADMA Biologics, Inc. following a report by Culper Research alleging that ADMA's reported growth is deceptive due to "channel stuffing" and an undisclosed related-party distributor. The stock experienced a significant drop after the report's publication. The law firm is encouraging investors who suffered losses to contact them to discuss their legal options.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) Trading Down 3.1% on Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) shares dipped 3.1% after Goldman Sachs and several other firms lowered their price targets, contributing to a sector-wide software pullback. Despite the analyst downgrades, ServiceNow reported a quarterly earnings beat and has positive catalysts such as AI partnerships and institutional buying. The company maintains a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, with a target price of $187.46, though insiders have recently sold shares.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) Trading Up 1.1% on Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) stock rose 1.1% after Guggenheim increased its price target to $244 and maintained a "buy" rating. Several other firms, including HSBC and Citi, also raised their price targets, contributing to a MarketBeat consensus of "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $237.57. Despite this positive analyst sentiment, company insiders sold approximately 30,142 shares worth about $7.36 million over the past three months, reducing insider ownership to 0.16%. The stock is trading above its 50-day and 200-day simple moving averages, with a market cap of $580.5 billion and a P/E ratio of 21.8.

feed.title: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) Trading Up 2.2% After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) stock rose 2.2% after Citigroup increased its price target from $42.00 to $48.00, though retaining a neutral rating. The increase comes despite recent disappointing quarterly results and concerns about rising operational and legal risks, including a cybersecurity incident and insider share sales. Analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average $57.41 price target, while institutional investors show mixed activity in PayPal shares.

feed.title: Shareholders back Cooper Companies (NYSE: COO) board, auditor and pay
feed.summary: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on April 7, 2026, where shareholders approved all key proposals. This included the election of all nine director nominees, the ratification of KPMG LLP as the independent auditor for the fiscal year ending October 31, 2026, and the advisory approval of executive compensation. The results indicate strong shareholder support for the company's governance, audit firm, and executive pay practices.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger Inc stock: Steady performer amid industrials shifts
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger Inc (GWW) is presented as a reliable industrial distributor offering steady performance due to its focus on essential maintenance, repair, and operating products. The article highlights its strong business model, digital presence, and analyst consensus leaning towards a "Hold" rating, noting its appeal for long-term investors seeking stability and dividend reliability despite some market risks.

feed.title: SLB Shareholders Strongly Support 2026 Annual Meeting Proposals
feed.summary: SLB shareholders demonstrated strong confidence in the company's governance and future direction by approving all proposals at their 2026 Annual General Meeting. This included backing director nominees, executive pay, 2025 financial statements, auditor ratification, and amendments to the stock incentive plan. Analyst Spark rates SLB as Neutral, citing strong financial quality and constructive earnings outlook, tempered by near-term technical momentum and Q1 operational disruption.

feed.title: Belgium selects Cessna SkyCourier for special operations fleet (TXT:NYSE)
feed.summary: Belgium has selected the Cessna SkyCourier aircraft for its Special Operations Forces, marking the platform's first entry into military service. The order includes five aircraft, which will be supplied by Textron.

feed.title: What’s Next For Northrop Grumman Corp (NOC) After Investing Ahead of Need?
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman Corp (NOC) is highlighted as a top-performing cybersecurity stock, having provided boosters for NASA’s Artemis II mission and secured a new contract with the US Navy for SEWIP Block 3 systems. Wells Fargo initiated coverage with an Overweight rating and an $800 price target, believing NOC will outperform peers due to its strategic investments that are now poised to yield significant benefits after weighing on free cash flow and profit margins in recent years.

feed.title: Jabil (NYSE: JBL) insider resale notices list share counts and recent sales
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has filed a Form 144 notice detailing proposed resales of common stock by an affiliate and recent sales by Michael Dastoor, totaling 23,997 shares in early 2026. The filing lists various equity lots (ESPP, RSU, PSU) with specific dates and small share counts, consistent with a routine regulatory notice rather than a corporate action. It also notes that the outstanding shares are 105,595,267 as of April 8, 2026.

feed.title: Costco Reports 11% Growth in March Sales
feed.summary: Costco reported a significant 11% growth in net sales for March, totaling $28.41 billion. This increase was driven by strong comparable sales across all regions, including a 9.4% rise overall and substantial growth in digitally enabled sales. Although there was one fewer shopping day, negatively impacting total sales by 1.5%, the wholesale retailer demonstrated robust performance.

feed.title: Cisco Systems (CSCO) See Vast Potential in Securing AI Agents
feed.summary: Cisco Systems is recognized as a top cybersecurity stock, with Truist Securities initiating a Buy rating due to strong networking business performance driven by AI infrastructure investment and campus product refreshes. Despite softness in its security business, Cisco sees vast potential in securing AI agents, unveiling new tools like Zero Trust Access and AI model testing at the RSA Conference 2026. The company aims to leverage these solutions to unlock the potential of AI agents, as 85% of enterprise customers experiment with AI but only 5% have moved them into production environments.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Launches AI Tool for Combating Brand Fraud
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) has introduced Brand Guardian, an AI-powered tool to combat brand fraud by automatically detecting and removing fraudulent websites and digital identities. This launch comes as generative AI makes it easier for scammers to create sophisticated fake sites, posing threats like revenue loss and damaged customer relationships. KeyBanc reaffirmed an Overweight rating on Akamai, citing potential growth from its GPU infrastructure opportunity, which could boost the company's growth rate from mid-single to double digits.

feed.title: Anderson County Council tax deal vote clears way for Duke Energy plant
feed.summary: Anderson County Council approved a tax deal that paves the way for Duke Energy to build a new $2.5 billion natural gas plant, creating over 30 jobs. While supporters highlight the economic benefits and tax revenue for schools and infrastructure, residents have raised concerns about potential environmental and health impacts from the 1,400-megawatt facility. Despite some residents pushing for a better deal, the council's 4-3 vote moves the project forward, with construction anticipated to begin in summer 2027.

feed.title: [ARS] Merck & Co., Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) made on April 8, 2026, at 4:32 PM. The filing is available as a PDF document and has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides an overview of MRK's stock performance and recent news, including tender offers and clinical trial updates.

feed.title: SLB shareholders approve all proposals at annual meeting, elect nine directors
feed.summary: SLB Limited/NV shareholders approved all proposals at the company's 2026 Annual General Meeting, including the election of nine director nominees, advisory approval of executive compensation, and ratification of financial statements and auditors. Shareholders also approved an amendment to the 2017 SLB Omnibus Stock Incentive Plan. These approvals support the company's governance and operational strategies.

feed.title: Fund Update: 149,346 BOOKING HOLDINGS (BKNG) shares added to SAPIENT CAPITAL LLC portfolio
feed.summary: SAPIENT CAPITAL LLC has increased its holdings in BOOKING HOLDINGS (BKNG) by adding 149,346 shares to its portfolio, as per a recent SEC 13F filing for the 03-31-2026 report period. This article also details significant recent institutional investor activity, insider trading, congressional stock trading, and analyst ratings and price targets for BKNG. Various firms have issued "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings, with a median price target of $5600.0 from 23 analysts.

feed.title: Fund Update: 33,024 INTUIT (INTU) shares added to SAPIENT CAPITAL LLC portfolio
feed.summary: SAPIENT CAPITAL LLC has increased its holdings in INTUIT (INTU) by adding 33,024 shares, as disclosed in a recent SEC 13F filing for the reporting period ending March 31, 2026. The article also details significant hedge fund activities, insider trading patterns (primarily sales), congressional stock trades, and current analyst ratings for INTU.

feed.title: FAA proposes to fine American Airlines for alleged drug, alcohol violations
feed.summary: The FAA has proposed a $255,000 civil penalty against American Airlines for allegedly violating drug and alcohol regulations. Between May 2019 and December 2023, the airline reportedly allowed 12 flight attendants who had failed drug and alcohol tests to return to safety-sensitive duties without completing all required follow-up testing. American Airlines has 30 days to respond to the FAA's enforcement letter.

feed.title: Jefferies raises DTE Energy stock price target on data center growth
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) to $170 from $153, maintaining a Buy rating, citing the company's strong progress in data center opportunities, including a recent 1 gigawatt deal with Google. The firm notes DTE Energy's pipeline of 5 to 6 gigawatts for data centers and projects an 8% or higher compound annual growth rate through 2030, with the stock currently trading at a discount compared to data center-exposed peers. Other analysts have also adjusted their price targets for DTE Energy following its clean energy agreement with Google, and UBS identified it as a high-quality dividend stock.

feed.title: Alcoa Corporation (AA): Upside Potential Attracts Billionaire Stan Druckenmiller
feed.summary: Billionaire Stan Druckenmiller's Duquesne Capital has renewed its stake in Alcoa Corporation (NYSE:AA), which is seen as a geopolitical hedge for aluminum. Geopolitical tensions, including strikes on Persian Gulf aluminum smelters, have caused aluminum prices to spike, benefiting Alcoa as a major North American producer. The company also reported strong financial results for Q4 2025, exceeding analyst expectations and showing significant year-over-year growth in net income.

feed.title: Algonquin Power (TSX/NYSE: AQN) schedules Q1 2026 results release and earnings call
feed.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (TSX/NYSE: AQN) has announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Friday, May 8, 2026, before market open. An earnings conference call will follow at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time on the same day, hosted by CEO Rod West and CFO Rob Stefani. Investors can access the call via toll-free and local dial-in numbers or through a live webcast available on Algonquin’s website.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 earnings after market close on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The company will also host a live earnings conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 8 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. Details for accessing the call and webcast are provided for investors.

feed.title: Hasbro Inc. stock: Gaming surge offsets toy woes – what investors need to know
feed.summary: Hasbro Inc. is experiencing a significant rebound in its stock, surging over 76% in the past year, primarily driven by its digital gaming and entertainment segments, particularly Wizards of the Coast. While the traditional toy market faces challenges, the company's strategic pivot to interactive entertainment and leveraging its intellectual property is positioning it for long-term growth and higher margins. Analysts maintain a balanced yet constructive outlook, suggesting moderate upside potential, making Hasbro an attractive option for investors seeking exposure to both physical and digital consumer trends.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley’s OCIO Boss Sees Scale, Differentiation Supporting Growth
feed.summary: Sona Menon, who leads Morgan Stanley Wealth Management's outsourced CIO team, reports strong double-digit growth across various client segments including retirement, endowments, foundations, and high-net-worth clients, with increasing interest from insurers. The firm differentiates itself through a combination of scale, customization, high-touch service, and a broad distribution network to meet the comprehensive demands of OCIO clients. Menon also emphasizes the importance of understanding client-specific needs for private market investments and alternative strategies, advocating for long-term perspectives amidst market volatility.

feed.title: zSpace (ZSPC) officer sells 7,586 shares to cover RSU tax obligations
feed.summary: Michael S. Harper, an officer at zSpace (ZSPC), sold 7,586 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $0.074 per share to cover tax obligations from a prior vesting of restricted stock units. This transaction, categorized as an open-market sale, leaves Harper with 47,811 shares of zSpace common stock directly held. The sale was executed across multiple transactions within a price range of $0.0702 to $0.0790.

feed.title: AutoNation (AN) Analyst Michael Ward Lowers Price Target to $269
feed.summary: Citigroup analyst Michael Ward has lowered the price target for AutoNation (AN) from $280 to $269, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating. This adjustment reflects current market conditions. The report also provides a summary of recent historical analyst ratings and an overview of AutoNation's business and analyst forecasts.

feed.title: UBS Analyst Lowers Price Target for Charles Schwab (SCHW) to $11
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Charles Schwab (SCHW) to $119 from $125, while maintaining a "Buy" rating for the stock. This adjustment reflects current market conditions and follows similar price target revisions by other financial institutions. Despite the reduced target, the average analyst target price of $118.88 still implies an upside of 22.94% from its current price, and the stock maintains an "Outperform" status based on brokerage recommendations.

feed.title: AMTD IDEA Group Explores Stock Dividend Distribution of Listed Subsidiaries
feed.summary: AMTD IDEA Group is considering distributing stock dividends from its listed subsidiaries to its shareholders and ADS holders. This move aims to unlock value from its expanding portfolio, which includes AMTD Digital and The Generation Essentials Group, along with its SPAC activities. While the potential distribution reflects the group's evolution since its 2019 IPO, management notes that the plan is exploratory and dependent on various factors, creating uncertainty for investors.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher Clarifies AssuredPartners Settlement And Acquisition Risk Exposure
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher has issued a clarification regarding a Department of Justice civil settlement related to an agency acquired from AssuredPartners. The company asserts that the settlement does not impact its acquisition of AssuredPartners, as the associated legal and financial exposure was anticipated and fully reserved prior to the deal. This disclosure aims to address investor concerns about acquisition-related risks and highlights Gallagher's due diligence process.

feed.title: Boeing Training Agreement Renewed for Three-Year Term
feed.summary: Delta Professional Services (DPS) has renewed its agreement with The Boeing Company to provide supplemental flight instruction and support training initiatives worldwide. The three-year contract, with an option for a two-year extension, involves DPS delivering instructor support aligned with competency-based training and assessment (CBTA) principles. A team of 43 professionals, including 37 instructors, will staff the Miami-based program.

feed.title: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) lists proposed sales of shares and PSUs on Form 144
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) has filed a Form 144 notice, indicating proposed sales of its common stock and performance stock units (PSUs). The filing details various share and PSU entries, with UBS Financial Services Inc. listed as the broker. The document provides key figures related to these proposed sales, including quantities and a date of 04/08/2026 for the NYSE exchange.

feed.title: American Healthcare REIT (AHR) EVP exercises RSUs and has shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: American Healthcare REIT (AHR) EVP, GC & Secretary Mark E. Foster exercised 2,986 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 6, 2026, which converted into common stock. A total of 1,612 shares were withheld at $48.09 each to cover tax obligations. Following these transactions, Foster directly holds 57,495 shares of AHR common stock, reflecting a routine equity vesting event rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: American Airlines (AAL) Enhances Expense Management with Expensi
feed.summary: American Airlines (AAL) has integrated with Expensify to streamline flight expense management for businesses using AAdvantage Business, automating receipt transfers and reconciliation. Despite this operational improvement, American Airlines faces notable financial challenges, including a low Altman Z-Score of 0.66, high leverage with a negative debt-to-equity ratio, and low profitability metrics. Investors should approach this stock cautiously due to these distress signals and sector-specific risks, despite its status as the world's largest airline.

feed.title: FRP Holdings, Inc. Announces Release Date for Its 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Earnings and Details for the Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: FRP Holdings, Inc. announced the anticipated release date for its fourth quarter and full year 2025 earnings results as Friday, April 10, 2026. The company will also file its Annual Report on Form 10-K by April 15, 2026, following a previously disclosed delay to complete the year-end audit. A conference call will be held on April 10, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET for analysts, stockholders, and interested parties.

feed.title: ADPT (NASDAQ: ADPT) affiliate files Form 144 listing 22,564 shares for sale
feed.summary: An affiliate of Adaptive Biotechnologies Corp (NASDAQ: ADPT) has filed a Form 144 indicating plans to sell 22,564 shares. This total includes 2,344 shares from the exercise of stock options dated April 8, 2026, and 20,220 shares issuable from Restricted Stock Units dated March 4, 2025. The filing also detailed prior 10b5-1 sales, including 30,593 shares on March 11, 2026, for $430,622.58, 38,074 shares on March 5, 2026, for $574,536.66, and 79,590 shares on January 12, 2026, for $1,411,393.35.

feed.title: Bank of America Announces Redemption of $3,000,000,000 3.559% Fixed/Floating Rate Senior Notes, Due April 2027
feed.summary: Bank of America announced its plan to redeem all $3 billion of its 3.559% Fixed/Floating Rate Senior Notes, due April 2027, on April 23, 2026. The redemption will be at 100% of the principal amount, plus accrued and unpaid interest. Interest on these notes will cease to accrue from the redemption date.

feed.title: American Healthcare REIT (AHR) CIO nets shares after RSU vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: American Healthcare REIT's Chief Investment Officer, Stefan K.L. Oh, exercised 3,185 restricted stock units (RSUs) which converted into common shares. The company withheld 1,621 of these shares at $48.09 each to cover tax obligations related to time-based RSUs that vested on April 3, 2026. Following these transactions, Oh directly holds 96,994 shares of common stock.
